description: Human-verified ability_category corrections for ability_records, keyed by ability name (case-insensitive). Seeded by bin/pf2_seed_change_overrides as human_verified=1 so classification passes never overwrite them. A seed failure (no matching record) means the ability was renamed or never parsed.

overrides.name: Cold Stasis
overrides.note: Classifier reads 'vulnerable to cold' as a sense-like passive; it is an always-on automatic ability (Broodpiercer host).

overrides.name: Mythic Power (Recharge Spell)
overrides.note: No action_type in source and no creature links to vote with; it recharges spell slots and belongs with offensive actions (Mythic Caster).
